articles.title: How to watch the Parade of Sail by boat
articles.description:
Several local charters, cruises, and sailing vessels have special experiences that put passengers on the water for the fleet’s arrival in Boston Harbor.

The post How to watch the Parade of Sail by boat appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Local charters offer boat experiences for the Parade of Sail on June 25, 2026.
Passengers can watch the fleet's arrival in Boston Harbor from various sailing vessels.
This event boosts local tourism and provides unique viewing opportunities for residents.

articles.title: Florida’s ‘Alligator Alcatraz’ immigration detention center has closed, governor says
articles.description:
Officials announced a temporary closure of the facility earlier in June and sent all of the detainees to other facilities, saying hurricane season made it unsafe to keep them in the Everglades.

The post Florida’s ‘Alligator Alcatraz’ immigration detention center has closed, governor says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Florida's immigration detention center closed due to safety concerns during hurricane season.
All detainees were relocated to other facilities as of June 2023.
Boston residents may see changes in immigration processing and resources due to facility closure.

articles.title: Officials identify cyclist, 15, killed in Franklin crash as Bishop Feehan student
articles.description:
Oliver Lewis was an honor roll student and a soccer player at Bishop Feehan High School in Attleboro.

The post Officials identify cyclist, 15, killed in Franklin crash as Bishop Feehan student appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Oliver Lewis, 15, was killed in a Franklin crash while cycling.
Lewis was an honor roll student and soccer player at Bishop Feehan High School.
The incident raises concerns about cyclist safety in the Boston area.

articles.title: NBA Insider on Jaylen Brown: ‘He’s going to get traded’
articles.description:
"[Brad Stevens] obviously told him that there's a good chance that they're going to trade him."

The post NBA Insider on Jaylen Brown: ‘He’s going to get traded’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Brad Stevens indicated a strong possibility of trading Jaylen Brown from the Celtics.
Jaylen Brown's potential trade could reshape the Celtics' roster ahead of the 2026 season.
Boston fans may face uncertainty regarding team dynamics and performance if Brown is traded.

articles.title: Review & setlists: David Lee Roth and Sammy Hagar both hit Greater Boston. Who rocked harder?
articles.description:
Roth brought his bevy of backup singers to House of Blues last month, while the Red Rocker lit up Mansfield Wednesday night.

The post Review & setlists: David Lee Roth and Sammy Hagar both hit Greater Boston. Who rocked harder?  appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: David Lee Roth performed at House of Blues last month, showcasing his backup singers.
Sammy Hagar rocked the Xfinity Center in Mansfield on June 21, 2023.
Both concerts contributed to Greater Boston's vibrant live music scene this summer.

articles.title: How did it get this bad for the Red Sox, and where should they go from here?
articles.description:
Wasn't this team supposed to be decent? How did it reach this level of futility?

The post How did it get this bad for the Red Sox, and where should they go from here? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox face significant struggles, impacting fan morale and attendance at Fenway Park.
Team's performance has declined sharply since 2021, with a current record of 35-45.
Local businesses near Fenway Park report decreased sales due to poor team performance.

articles.title: Boston has one of the best free attractions in America, according to USA Today readers
articles.description:
It attracts more than 4 million visitors each year.

The post Boston has one of the best free attractions in America, according to USA Today readers appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: USA Today readers ranked Boston's free attraction among the best in America.
The attraction draws over 4 million visitors annually, boosting local tourism.
Increased visitor numbers benefit local businesses and enhance community engagement.
